vllm.title: [V1] Fully Transparent Implementation of CPU Offloading
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Right now (in v0.8.1), vLLM V1 does not support CPU offloading, because the implementation is not compatible with torch.compile. The implementation is not compatible with some quantization, lora, MLA, etc.
To solve the issue, I try to re-implement CPU offloading in a fully transparent way: we offloa

vllm.title: [Model] Update support for NemotronNAS models
vllm.author: Naveassaf
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add support for latest (as of March 18, 2025) nemotron-nas type models. These models are currently of architecture DeciLMForCausalLM.
Practically:

Define has_noops models that may have decoder blocks with NOOP attention or MLPs.
Move modeling definition of DeciLMForCausalLM to be under nemotron_nas

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Crashing When Loading Modules With Batchnorm Stats
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the AutoWeightsLoader crashes if it encounters batch normalization stats in the model's safetensors. This is because the bn stats aren't part of the named_parameters, but they are part of the state dict, likely due to the reasons mentioned on the PyTorch forums here.
This PR adds loading

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix missing return value in load_weights method of adapters.py
vllm.author: noc-turne
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously, the load_weights method in adapters.py did not return the weights, which caused loaded_params to be None in some cases — for example, when using the Qwen2ForEmbedding model (see vllm/models/utils.py#L171-L177).
This PR fixes the issue by properly returning the result of load_weights, and

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Check dimensions of multimodal embeddings in V1
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Assert that get_multimodal_embeddings indeed outputs a sequence of 2-D tensors, and fix the models that fail the assertion.
During the process, I found that some example scripts cannot run on L40 without OOM so I updated them.
This is to facilitate #15712

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Decode] Remove deprecated spec decode config params
vllm.author: ShangmingCai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR serves as a follow-up to PR #14434.
It removes the deprecated spec decode configuration parameters and stale warning code. Additionally, the JSON decode logic of speculative_config has been optimized. Some related docsring and tests have been updated as well to respect these changes.
CC: @Li

vllm.title: [sleep mode] clear pytorch cache after sleep
vllm.author: lionelvillard
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Clear PyTorch cache right after putting the instance to sleep.
For ibm-granite/granite-20b-code-instruct-8k, memory use before this fix is:
INFO 03-20 19:40:47 [gpu_worker.py:81] Sleep mode freed 37.55 GiB memory, 3.29 GiB memory is still in use.

And with this fix:
INFO 03-20 19:45:25 [gpu_worker.p
